problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
